title: Food Web Anywhere
subtitle: Find the jobs living things do
learning_goal: Notice producers, consumers, and decomposers as different jobs in an ecosystem.
intro: A food web is made of jobs. Find one producer, one consumer, and one recycler wherever you can safely look.
outro: You mapped a tiny food web from real observations.

steps.hint: Plants make food from sunlight. Grass, moss, weeds, and trees all count.
Animals eat plants, fungi, or other animals. Bugs, birds, snails, and dogs count.
Mushrooms, lichens, isopods, millipedes, and earthworms recycle dead material.
